transcript.text:
(Special meets special)
(To bring together four flavors...)
('Mr. Pizza') Thank you for the meal
(Four amazing flavors in one pie)
(But those flavors are equally delicious) It's good, it's really good
(But those flavors are equally delicious) It's so good
There's a reason it's a popular dish
(Let's find out the secret behind Mr. Pizza's popularity)
Hello, everyone
Today, I'm here to eat
(Let's see)
('Mr. Pizza', the golden standard for pizza) at 'Mr. Pizza'
I've been eating at 'Mr. Pizza' since I was little
Apparently,
(34 years of tradition) it's been around for 34 years
They've got a new dish so I'm here to try it

Oh, here it is!
(4 signature toppings in one pie, called '4gather') This must be the new dish
(4 signature toppings in one pie, called '4gather') There are 4 flavors, I like that
(Let's go) I'm on my way
(Entering 'Mr. Pizza'...) Hello
The menu is so cute
It's round like this
New dish!
This must be the new dish
(The Fantastick 3 make a great snack) This looks like a new dish too
It's a pizza place but they've got tteokbokki
I bet it'd taste good with the tteokbokki too
- Is this the new dish? - Yes, it is
(Can try all 4 signature toppings in one pie) This is a pizza with 4 of our popular toppings:
(Can try all 4 signature toppings in one pie) cheese blossom steak, king bread shrimp gold chili, potato gold, and sweet potato
What's the crust?

You can choose between gold, cream cheese, egg tart, cheese cap or origin
Among those, gold is the basic crust for this pizza
I'll get the basic then!
With a large 4gather
All 3 types of the Fantastick
(Shrimp gold sandwich + potato gold sandwich + bulgogi sandwich) And all 3 of these sandwiches
- Would you like all 3? - Yes
And the MP tteokbokki
(Finished ordering) And a Coke for my drink, please
(Impressive hand movements making the dough...)
(Not your regular dough-making)
(Who could this be...?)
(The identity of this extraordinary will be revealed soon...!)
(4 toppings on 1 piece of dough)
(4 different toppings piled on the dough)
(After cooking in the hot oven...)

(The pizza is done)
(A combo of all the popular menu dishes, 'Mr. Pizza' 4gather)
(3 kinds of pizza on thin dough)
(The name is fantastic too...)
(Fantastick can be enjoyed alone too)
(Different toppings on ciabatta bread!)
(MP sandwich: a pizza that can be eaten with one hand)
(Tteokbokki at 'Mr. Pizza'...?)
(MP tteokbokki to enjoy together with the pizza!)
(Pizza's here) Thank you
Thank you
Wow, the pizza looks good
I haven't had 'Mr. Pizza' in a long time
Thank you for the meal, what should I eat first?
This is the pizza with 4 different toppings
I like sweet potato

So let me try the sweet potato first
(First pick for 4gather, sweet potato!) Wow, this looks delicious!
Pizza tastes best when it's warm
Wow, the sweet potato looks so good
There's a lot of sweet potato mousse on top
Wow, it's so good...!
This kinda
The sweet potato pizza
It melts in your mouth!
It's very smooth
The crust
(Going straight for the dip...!) tastes good with the 'Mr. Pizza' dipping sauce
(The crust is amazing) The crust is so good
(Time to fill up on Coke) Pizza goes best with Coke!
Wow, but this pizza
is totally my taste

because the crust
(Creamy sweet potato bomb...!) is filled with sweet potato mousse
(Saving the sweet potato for last!) I wanna try one more slice but I'll save it for later
This is the cheese blossom steak,
king bread shrimp gold chili,
and potato gold
(Second pick) Cheese blossom steak
(There's a reason why it's a signature dish...!) There's a reason why it's a popular choice
So far,
I've only tried the cheese crust
(Sweet charm of the sweet potato...!) But the gold mousse is really good
We've got the tteokbokki here
This is my first time eating tteokbokki at a pizza place
(Churros rice cake with a unique and chewy texture) The rice cake looks interesting, it's churros rice cake apparently
What is this?
It doesn't taste sweet like I expected

It's hot
(Goes great with the pizza because it's hot!) It'll go well with the pizza
Next is
(Third pick) king bread shrimp gold chili, that name is really hard lol
Wow, this is...
I thought they all tasted different from regular pizza
And it's because they use chili sauce instead of tomato sauce!
Ah, that's why it's spicy
Yum, it's good!
(Can't forget to dip in the sauce!)
The crust tastes good because it doesn't just taste like bread
(Combo of the chewy texture and sweet potato...) It's really chewy like sesame bread
So it tastes really good
This is the last one that I haven't tried yet
(Fourth pick) Potato gold is definitely a signature dish!
Potato, bacon, and sour cream!

It's so good...
True to its most popular dish name,
it tastes like your typical potato pizza
(Finishing with a big bite of the crust...!) It's delicious
Shall I try one of these?
Among these three,
the corn cheese looks the most interesting
(Stick-shaped pizza that's easy to eat!) Oh, it looks like this, that's cool
(The Fantastick 3 are good for eating alone) These are called the Fantastick 3
(Portion size is just right for 1 person!) They made it so that you can eat it alone
It's very thin
But it kinda feels like a snack
You know those days when
(Can't eat a large pizza alone...) pizza seems a little too heavy
(A pizza that you can eat alone!) This is perfect for those days
(Finished it in one sitting)

(Disappeared) It's gone
It's perfect!
They made a pizza
in sandwich form
(One pizza pie in one hand! MP pizza) It's like a pizza for one
(Shrimp gold / potato gold / bulgogi) They put the popular toppings on the ciabatta bread!
It's different than what I expected
I thought the bread would be hard
But the outside is very thin and crispy
and the inside is very soft
(Lots of fillings inside too...!) Inside, there's bulgogi
Bulgogi pizza tastes best with parmesan gold
(Sprinkle)
This is perfect for a simple meal
This Fantastick
is the cream cheese flavor

(Sweet condensed milk sauce poured on cream cheese sticks) The cream cheese looks like string cheese sticks
The cream cheese
isn't the hard type of cream cheese
It's kinda like custard cream
It's very soft
and smooth
It's very smooth
I think it'll taste good with the tteokbokki

It's good
If it was cut once more, it'd be perfect to have with beer
It's time to eat the pizza again
It's so good!
This
(The stick tasted good, will the crust taste good too...?) It'll probably be good with the tteokbokki sauce too
It's spicy!

(Match made in heaven) They go well together!
Dipping it once in a while when it gets too greasy is a good idea
Next up
Should we try another baguette?
(Shrimp gold sandwich with big shrimp and sweet potato) This is the shrimp gold sandwich
It's amazing
It feels like I'm eating pizza, not a sandwich
(The pizza became hard after it cooled down) The pizza cheese hardened
So I should ask them to reheat it
(Reheated in the microwave) Thank you, ah it's hot
It's so hot that I can't touch it, should I eat it with this?
Wow, delicious
Is this tabasco?
(That's it...?) Is it spicy?
(Let's just say that was a spill) It doesn't make any difference, did I add too little?
(Uh... that looks like too much...) Let me try with a lot of tabasco sauce

(She doesn't know what 'in moderation' means lol) It looks like vinegar
(Last Fantastick 3) It has sweet potato
(Sweet honey and sweet potato, honey sweet potato stick) and if you see on top here, it looks like honey
It'll probably taste really good with this
(Get a bite of the tteokbokki first...)
I'll try a bite now
It's so good...!
Dip it in here
Hello, thank you for the meal
Champion?!
(World Pizza Games that were held in 2015 in Las Vegas)
(Became a world champion as a proud representative of Korea!) He became a champion there!
(Became a world champion as a proud representative of Korea!) Champion? Really?
(Huh...?) He spun 3 pieces of dough?!?
- Not 3, the world*... - (Lol) *Korean word for 3 things and world sound the same
(Dummy)

(3 pieces of dough should be a Guinness World Record... lol) Not 3, a world champion
(I should show my real skills...)
(Champion enters)
(Pay attention)
(This is...)
(The pride of 'Mr. Pizza...!)
(Killer moves)
(He turned this place upside down...!)
(Champions don't look back...)
(Feels like we watched something incredible...) He's amazing at spinning the dough
- Would you like me to reheat this? - Ah yes!
(Finished reheating) It's hot right now
The meat is really good
It's tender
and soft
(Popular yet simple dish, potato gold sandwich) Potato gold sandwich, this must be that too

And in here...
(Full of sweet potato) Sweet potato mousse
This tastes like the real potato gold pizza...!
The most popular dish at 'Mr. Pizza'
is potato gold pizza
They put all the same toppings as the potato gold pizza
And made it for one person so it's very popular
(Won Tzuyang's heart) This is the tastiest bread out of all of them
(Reheating in the microwave) Thank you
Last one!
Pizza usually gets greasy so you might get tired of it
But there's chili sauce inside so it gets rid of the greasiness
It's not greasy at all, I enjoyed eating it all
(How can she drink this much Coke...) It's okay to drink this much Coke with pizza
The sweet potato mousse is really thick
There are sweet potato cubes inside, it's so good

This is the last
('Mr. Pizza' new dishes ALL CLEAR)
(That was good)
I was able to enjoy it all without getting tired of it

that I had today
